## Testing Done

- [ ] `pytest -v` passes
- [ ] Manual testing: _______

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (`Fixes #N` or `Closes #N`)
- [ ] Commits are logical (one concern per commit)
- [ ] No debug code left (`print()`, `breakpoint()`, commented-out code)
- [ ] Docstrings on new public functions/classes
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No new dependencies without discussion

CLI output, etc.

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know — tradeoffs, follow-ups, concerns.
